differentials.name: lesser amount of vasogenic edema); multifocal inflammatory lesions
differentials.raw: lesser amount of vasogenic edema); multifocal inflammatory lesions

context: hypointensity more pronounced in melanoma + mucinous adenocarcinoma ← | homogeneous / ring / nodular mixed enhancement after Gd-DTPA; often more than one | asymmetric enhancement of dura with dural spread | leptomeningeal enhancement (eg, in metastatic ependymoma)
